title: Bridge Essay: Mystical and Affective Aspects of Psychedelic Use in a Naturalistic Setting: A L

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Mystical and Affective Aspects of Psychedelic Use in a Naturalistic Setting: A Linguistic Analysis of Online Experience Reports.**. J Psychoactive Drugs.. PMID: 37921118. DOI: 10.1080/02791072.2023.2274382. Analyzing online retrospective experience reports of psychedelic use can provide valuable insight into their acute subjective effects. Such reports are unexplored in relation to mystical states, which are thought to be atherapeutic mechanism within psychedelic-assisted psychotherapy. We created aset of words that, when encountered in an experience report, indicate the occurrence of mystical elements within the experience.
